title: polemonium foliosissimum subsp. decurrens
intro: Polemonium foliosissimum subsp. decurrens, also known as Jacob's ladder, is a plant species in the flowering plant family Polemoniaceae. Traditionally, Jacob's ladder has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory abilities, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing coughs, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, Jacob's ladder is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
